ops.text: cc-transcript@0.9.0 (released) is missing the commands/permissions/corrections subcommands that exist in the dev checkout — the audit design pass "verified live" against dev and the pinned release then failed 3 of 6 discovery lanes (No such command). Also on 0.9.0 grep: comma --kind (user,assistant) rejected exit 2 (wants repeated --kind flags), --with-result not a flag, flags must FOLLOW the pattern argument. And full-corpus greps that take ~67s solo ballooned to 40+ min at ~5GB RSS with 15 concurrent scans — no corpus lock/shared index, so fan-outs must cap concurrency ~3. Hit during AUDIT-PLF-2026-07 mining wave 1.
